name: Pil Italica Lifestyle Limited
summary: Pil Italica Lifestyle Limited manufactures and sells plastic molded furniture and other articles in India and internationally. It operates through three segments: Manufacturing, Trading, and Finance. The company offers plastic chairs, tables, patla/stools, trolleys, sun loungers, storage and waste bins, and crates under the ITALICA brand. Its products are used in homes, offices, stadiums, gardens, playgrounds, beaches, and others. The company also provides outdoor plastic and garden furniture; finance and investment activities; and consultancy and other services. It sells its products through a network of distributors and dealers. The company was formerly known as Peacock Industries Limited and changed its name to Pil Italica Lifestyle Limited in August 2015. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Udaipur, India. Pil Italica Lifestyle Limited is a subsidiary of Dawood Investment Private Limited.
